message.content:
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "theprogram" {
    class TheProgram <<C>> 
}

class SQLWorker <<C>> 

TheProgram --> SQLWorker : uses >

SQLWorker -[hidden]-> Connection
Connection <..- DriverManager
ResultSet <-- Statement
Statement ..> ArrayList
ArrayList .up. Map
Map -- BufferedReader
BufferedReader -> IOException
IOException <- InputStreamReader

note right of SQLException\n<<java.sql.SQLException>>\n--\nclass java.lang.Object {\n  +boolean equals(Object obj)\n}\nnote bottom of ResultSetMetaData\n<<interface>\><<java.sql.ResultSetMetaData>>\n--\ntype String getColumnLabel(int column) throws SQLException; \nint getColumnType(int column);\nString getTypeName(int col); end note

@enduml
